author: y4rr
content: ferrotorch-whisper crate added (24th workspace member). Encoder-only scope: log-mel preprocessing + 4-layer transformer encoder with sinusoidal positional embedding + conv stem. Decoder out of scope. PASS first-try: cosine_sim=1.0, max_abs=0.0003. Pinned to ferrotorch/whisper-tiny-encoder (SHA 2e18d7c1cdfd) with value-parity fixtures (audio, mel, encoder output). 26 lib tests.
